positive: A whimsical, stylized scene of a glowing crescent moon cradling a cluster of bioluminescent flora and woodland creatures. The main subject is a stylized, deep blue stylized fox sitting calmly, surrounded by abstract shapes of glowing leaves and ethereal mist. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, designed for apparel printing, using bold, high-contrast linework and flat color blocking inspired by art deco and graphic nature illustration. Style: Modern minimalist folk art, vector illustration, highly saturated but restrained color palette (electric blues, teal, deep indigo, soft gold accents). Lighting: Simulated glow emanating from the flora, creating rim lighting on the fox. Print Details: High visibility when scaled, strong black outlines, clean negative space, designed for screen printing effect. --ar 1:1
